creator: SerShav@yahoo.com
text:
the intel driver totally freezes the system so i have to hard turn off...
when I come back on to check the Xorg.0.log, it's not there... it's only
there if i ran the vesa driver, but if i delete it and run the intel driver,
it's not there... the driver i have is xf86-video-intel-2.7.1_3 ... the
kernel is GENERIC... i test it with $sudo X -config xorg.conf.txt -retro

How-To-Repeat: have 855gm, install xorg-7.5 with xf86-video-intel-2.7.1_3, use 'intel'
as a driver in your xorg.conf, start X
